title: Flamingo - Software update for just headset
scenario: Selective DFU updates only the headset firmware while leaving charge case firmware unchanged when separate Update buttons are available
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Locate your connected device and tap the Update button on the device card.
3. On the Software Update tab, verify that the top of the screen shows an "Update All" button.
4. Confirm that separate "Update" buttons are displayed for the headset and the charge case.
5. Tap the "Update" button next to the headset (not the charge case).
6. Follow the on-screen prompts to complete the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process for the headset.
7. After the update completes, verify that the headset firmware version has been updated to the new version.
8. Verify that the charge case firmware version remains unchanged (still shows the previous version).
expected: Only the headset firmware is updated; the charge case firmware remains unchanged.
